text: Artificial intelligence is used in healthcare to improve diagnosis and treatment.
Machine learning helps doctors analyze large amounts of patient data efficiently.
Deep learning models can detect diseases from medical images with high accuracy.
Natural language processing helps in understanding medical reports and patient records.
AI systems assist doctors in making better clinical decisions.
Data science improves hospital management and patient care.
Automation in healthcare reduces manual work and increases efficiency.
AI-based tools help in early disease detection.
Healthcare analytics helps in predicting patient outcomes.
AI is transforming modern healthcare systems worldwide.
